message.content:
Subject: Formal Complaint Regarding Late and Damaged Package

Dear [Company Name] Customer Service Team,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to formally express my dissatisfaction with the recent delivery of a package that I ordered from your company. The package was not only delivered two weeks later than the expected delivery date but was also found to be damaged upon arrival. I believe this constitutes a significant breach of your service standards and I expect a prompt and satisfactory resolution to this issue.

I ordered the package on [insert date] through your online ordering system. The confirmation email indicated that the package was scheduled for delivery on [insert expected delivery date]. However, as of today, [insert current date], the package has not been delivered, and I have been informed by my local delivery service that it was delivered on [insert actual delivery date], which is two weeks late.

Upon receiving the package, I immediately noticed that it was damaged. The item was not in the condition I expected, and I am now unable to use it as intended. I have attached photographs of the damaged package for your reference. I understand that unforeseen circumstances may sometimes affect delivery timelines, but in this case, the delay was significant and the damage to the package was not addressed in a timely manner.

I expect that you will take full responsibility for this incident and provide a clear explanation for the delay and the damage. I also request that you offer a solution to rectify the situation, which may include a refund, replacement, or compensation for the inconvenience caused.

Please note that this is not the first time I have had an issue with your company, and I have previously raised concerns about delivery times and product condition. I hope that this time, you will take the matter seriously and provide a satisfactory resolution.

I would appreciate it if you could respond to this email within 7 business days, providing a detailed explanation and outlining the steps you will
